subSteps.input:
{'planning_notes': "1) First, I need to read the CSV file containing the report data using datasource.read
2) Then I'll need to filter for the specific years 2024 and 2001
3) Extract the identity theft report counts for both years
4) Calculate the ratio of 2024 to 2001
5) Present the final answer using llm.answer", 'workflow': {'root': {'nodes': {'read_file': {'id': 'read_file', 'type': 'datasource.read', 'params': {'datasource_id': 'e6caea44-dd8b-4ab8-ba10-a11750d970bc'}, 'metadata': {'position': {'x': 80, 'y': 120}}}, 'filter_2024': {'id': 'filter_2024', 'type': 'rows.filter', 'params': {'column': 'Number of Reports by Type', 'operator': 'eq', 'value': '2024'}, 'metadata': {'position': {'x': 320, 'y': 80}}}, 'filter_2001': {'id': 'filter_2001', 'type': 'rows.filter', 'params': {'column': 'Number of Reports by Type', 'operator': 'eq', 'value': '2001'}, 'metadata': {'position': {'x': 320, 'y': 160}}}, 'select_identity_theft_2024': {'id': 'select_identity_theft_2024', 'type': 'rows.select', 'params': {'columns': ['Identity Theft ']}, 'metadata': {'position': {'x': 560, 'y': 40}}}, 'select_identity_theft_2001': {'id': 'select_identity_theft_2001', 'type': 'rows.select', 'params': {'columns': ['Identity Theft ']}, 'metadata': {'position': {'x': 560, 'y': 200}}}, 'calculate_ratio': {'id': 'calculate_ratio', 'type': 'python.code', 'params': {'code': "import sys, json

data = json.load(sys.stdin)

# Load the dataset refs
if 'dataset_ref' in data:
    dataset_refs = data['dataset_ref']
    if len(dataset_refs) >= 2:
        df_2024 = load_dataset_ref(dataset_refs[0])
        df_2001 = load_dataset_ref(dataset_refs[1])
        
        # Extract values
        value_2024 = df_2024.iloc[0]['Identity Theft ']
        value_2001 = df_2001.iloc[0]['Identity Theft ']
        
        # Convert to integers (removing commas)
        value_2024 = int(value_2024.replace(',', ''))
        value_2001 = int(value_2001.replace(',', ''))
        
        # Calculate ratio
        ratio = value_2024 / value_2001
        
        # Emit the result
        emit_json({'ratio': ratio, 'value_2024': value_2024, 'value_2001': value_2001})
    else:
        emit_json({'error': 'Not enough dataset references'})
else:
    emit_json({'error': 'No dataset references provided'})"}, 'metadata': {'position': {'x': 800, 'y': 120}}}, 'answer': {'id': 'answer', 'type': 'llm.answer', 'params': {'question': 'Calculate the ratio of identity theft reports in 2024 vs 2001 using the provided dataset.'}, 'metadata': {'position': {'x': 1040, 'y': 120}}}}, 'edges': {'edge_read_to_filter_2024': {'id': 'edge_read_to_filter_2024', 'source': {'node_id': 'read_file', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}, 'target': {'node_id': 'filter_2024', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}}, 'edge_read_to_filter_2001': {'id': 'edge_read_to_filter_2001', 'source': {'node_id': 'read_file', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}, 'target': {'node_id': 'filter_2001', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}}, 'edge_filter_2024_to_select': {'id': 'edge_filter_2024_to_select', 'source': {'node_id': 'filter_2024', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}, 'target': {'node_id': 'select_identity_theft_2024', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}}, 'edge_filter_2001_to_select': {'id': 'edge_filter_2001_to_select', 'source': {'node_id': 'filter_2001', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}, 'target': {'node_id': 'select_identity_theft_2001', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}}, 'edge_select_2024_to_ratio': {'id': 'edge_select_2024_to_ratio', 'source': {'node_id': 'select_identity_theft_2024', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}, 'target': {'node_id': 'calculate_ratio', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}}, 'edge_select_2001_to_ratio': {'id': 'edge_select_2001_to_ratio', 'source': {'node_id': 'select_identity_theft_2001', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}, 'target': {'node_id': 'calculate_ratio', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}}, 'edge_ratio_to_answer': {'id': 'edge_ratio_to_answer', 'source': {'node_id': 'calculate_ratio', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}, 'target': {'node_id': 'answer', 'port_id': 'dataset_ref'}}}}}}
